---
ID: US-SLD-070
Title: Deliver V3 Responsive Layout and Aspect-Ratio Intelligent Repositioning
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want slides to adapt intelligently across aspect ratios and layout contexts
So I can reuse deck content without manual full-canvas reconstruction

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Layout constraints are applied to responsive adaptation logic.
- [ ] Pinned elements retain anchor intent across aspect-ratio changes.
- [ ] Column/stack/card/grid structures maintain relative spacing and hierarchy.
- [ ] Aspect-ratio switch workflow performs intelligent repositioning and bounded resize behavior.
- [ ] Post-adaptation state remains fully editable and persists to canonical SlideDocument JSON.
